title: streptanthus breweri var. hesperidis
intro: Streptanthus breweri var. hesperidis is a rare and unique variety of the Brewer's lupine, a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. It is native to the western United States and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
